description: The Kawasaki Ninja H2R is a closed-course supercharged hyperbike. Utilizing a centrifugal supercharger on its 998cc engine, it generates a wild 310 HP and can breach 249 mph.
A multi-time World Superbike championship winner, the ZX-10R offers incredible track capabilities. Equipped with high-spec Showa suspension and advanced electronics for cornering management.
The Yamaha YZF-R1 features the famous crossplane crankshaft 998cc inline-four engine, yielding a unique exhaust note and linear power delivery. Extremely sharp handling.
The MT-09 is a street-shredding hyper-naked bike. Powered by a high-torque 890cc CP3 triple engine, it offers raw fun, aggressive styling, and exceptional lightweight agility.
The Yamaha R6 is a legendary high-revving middleweight supersport bike. Built for absolute track performance with high-revving 599cc engine and a razor-sharp front end.
Honda's Fireblade legacy continues with the CBR1000RR. Balancing control and power, its 999cc engine is matched to a beautifully balanced chassis and responsive rider aids.
The Honda Africa Twin is built for extreme adventure. Its parallel-twin engine, long-travel suspension, and optional dual-clutch transmission (DCT) make it a master of trails and highways.
The Suzuki Hayabusa is synonymous with hyper-speed sport touring. Re-engineered with aerodynamic styling and a suite of electronics, it pulls hard throughout the rev range.
The GSX-R1000 represents the pinnacle of Suzuki sportbikes. Outfitted with variable valve timing and high-end Brembo brakes, it is built to dominate tracks around the world.
The Ducati Panigale V4 S is pure Italian racing performance. Harnessing a Desmosedici Stradale V4 engine and active Ohlins electronic suspension, it offers thrilling velocity and precision.
A Panigale V4 stripped of its fairings and given wide upright handlebars. The Streetfighter V4 outputs 208 HP, creating a fierce naked motorcycle experience.
The Multistrada V4 is the ultimate sport touring adventure machine. Its V4 Granturismo engine boasts 170 HP with a massive valve clearance service interval of 37,000 miles.
The BMW S 1000 RR features ShiftCam technology for high-revving top end power and massive low-end torque. Complete with race-focused dynamic traction control.
The benchmark of adventure motorcycles, the R 1250 GS is powered by BMW's legendary boxer engine. ShiftCam technology provides robust grunt across all terrains.
Affectionately dubbed 'The Beast', the Super Duke 1290 R is powered by a massive 1,301cc V-twin engine. Unbelievable torque, high-end WP APEX suspension, and aggressive styling.
An exotic superbike from Austria, the KTM RC8 R features a unique angular design and an aggressive V-twin engine. Highly mechanical and raw track-bred feel.
The RSV4 Factory is powered by a race-derived 1,099cc 65-degree V4 engine. Fitted with forged aluminum wheels, Ohlins Smart EC 2.0 suspension, and integrated winglets.
The Triumph Rocket 3 R carries the largest production motorcycle engine in the world, a massive 2,500cc triple. It delivers a torque-rich experience that destroys acceleration records.
Triumph's ultimate performance naked bike, the Speed Triple 1200 RS, features a responsive 1,160cc triple engine. Combining race track components with street handling.
Featuring the frame-mounted shark-nose fairing, the Road Glide Special is a touring icon. Built around the powerful Milwaukee-Eight 114 engine for high-end highway cruising.
The Tuono V4 Factory is the naked translation of the RSV4 superbike. An absolute adrenaline machine featuring electronic suspension and aggressive street ergonomics.
A sculpture on wheels, the MV Agusta F4 RR is an exotic marvel of Italian design. Combining a four-pipe under-seat exhaust, high-revving 998cc engine, and premium build.
With blacked-out styling, a mini-ape handlebar, and a quarter fairing, the Indian Scout Rogue stands out. Powered by a liquid-cooled 1,133cc V-twin.
The Bonneville Bobber is a stunning factory custom cruiser. It features a floating aluminum single seat, wire-spoke wheels, and a high-torque 1,200cc parallel twin.
The Sportster S is a high-performance custom cruiser, powered by the liquid-cooled Revolution Max 1250T engine. Offering aggressive styling and incredible torque.
The V-Strom 1050 DE is engineered for rough-road adventures. Powered by a dependable 1037cc 90-degree V-twin, it features wire-spoke wheels and off-road modes.
The Diavel V4 combines cruiser comfort with superbike acceleration. Its Granturismo V4 engine makes 168 HP, while the single-sided swingarm highlights its muscular stance.
Known as 'The Super Scalpel', the 890 Duke R is a lightweight track weapon. Equipped with high-spec Brembo Stylema brakes and fully adjustable WP APEX suspension.
A modern, minimalist interpretation of a cafe racer, the Vitpilen 701 is powered by a high-torque single-cylinder engine and features exceptional premium styling.
The M 1000 RR is BMW's ultimate homologation racing special. Carbon fiber winglets, carbon wheels, and a blueprinted engine pumping 212 HP make it a racing force.
The Moto Guzzi V85 TT is a retro-styled adventure touring bike. Powered by a transverse 90-degree V-twin, it offers comfortable highway mileage and unique character.
The Honda Gold Wing is the gold standard for long-distance luxury cruising. Powered by a smooth 1,833cc flat-six engine and featuring a dual-clutch transmission (DCT).
